headline: Roche Reports Positive Results From Head-to-Head Study on NSCLC Drug
summary: RHHBY announces positive phase III Krascendo 1 results for divarasib in KRAS G12C NSCLC, showing PFS and OS gains versus approved inhibitors.

raw.headline: Roche Reports Positive Results From Head-to-Head Study on NSCLC Drug

headline: 3 Nasdaq 100 Stocks to Research Further
summary: The biggest names in tech, e-commerce, and digital transformation are in the Nasdaq 100 (^NDX), but only a few are leading the pack. Some companies in this index are proving their resilience and expanding their competitive advantages.

headline: Amgen (AMGN) Stock Is Up, What You Need To Know
summary: Shares of biotech company Amgen (NASDAQ:AMGN) jumped 3.1% in the afternoon session after the company received a favorable court ruling that blocked a first-of-its-kind state price cap on its blockbuster drug, Enbrel.
